ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tube_assemblies" (
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tube assembly */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material used in the tube assembly */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the tube assembly */,
  "wall" REAL /* Wall thickness of the tube assembly */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the tube assembly */,
  "num_bends" INTEGER /* Number of bends in the tube assembly */,
  "bend_radius" REAL /* Bend radius of the tube assembly */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The company that manufactures the tube assembly */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* The date when the tube assembly was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* A unique serial number for each tube assembly */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the tube assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tube_assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tube_assemblies_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "end_fittings" (
  "end_fitting_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each end-fitting component */,
  "end_fitting_name" TEXT /* Name of the end-fitting component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the end-fitting component */,
  "compatible_materials" TEXT /* A list of materials the end-fitting is compatible with */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the end-fitting */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the end-fitting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("end_fitting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_configurations" (
  "assembly_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly configuration */,
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tube assembly */,
  "end_fitting_id" TEXT /* Reference to the end-fitting component */,
  "num_boss" INTEGER /* Number of bosses in the assembly configuration */,
  "num_bracket" INTEGER /* Number of brackets in the assembly configuration */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* The date when the assembly configuration was created */,
  "assembly_by" TEXT /* The employee who created the assembly configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assembly configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_configurations_tube_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("tube_assembly_id") REFERENCES tube_assemblies ("tube_assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_configurations_end_fitting_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_fitting_id") REFERENCES end_fittings ("end_fitting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_inventory" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The reorder level for the component */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the next expected reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for components from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "quality_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tube assembly */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control test */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* The employee who performed the quality control test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the quality control test */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether a retest is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_tube_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("tube_assembly_id") REFERENCES tube_assemblies ("tube_assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_tracking" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tube assembly */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity produced */,
  "produced_by" TEXT /* The employee who produced the tube assembly */,
  "machine_id" TEXT /* The ID of the machine used for production */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_tracking_tube_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("tube_assembly_id") REFERENCES tube_assemblies ("tube_assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the employee was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
